records.question: What tracks named Free Speech For The Dumb were composed exactly by Molaney/Morris/Roberts/Wainwright?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tracks.id FROM tracks
JOIN albums ON tracks.album_id = albums.id
JOIN artists ON albums.artist_id = artists.id
WHERE tracks.name = 'Free Speech For The Dumb' AND tracks.composer = 'Molaney/Morris/Roberts/Wainwright'
records.pred_sql: SELECT id FROM tracks WHERE name = 'Free Speech For The Dumb' AND composer = 'Molaney/Morris/Roberts/Wainwright'

records.question: Which tracks have a duration of exactly 269035 milliseconds, a size of exactly 8885672 bytes, and also have related media types, albums, invoice lines, and playlist tracks?

SELECT tracks.id FROM tracks
JOIN media_types ON tracks.media_type_id = media_types.id
JOIN albums ON tracks.album_id = albums.id
JOIN invoice_lines ON tracks.id = invoice_lines.track_id
JOIN playlist_tracks ON tracks.id = playlist_tracks.track_id
WHERE tracks.milliseconds = 269035 AND tracks.bytes = 8885672

  T1.id
FROM tracks AS T1
WHERE
  T1.milliseconds = 269035 AND T1.bytes = 8885672 AND T1.album_id IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS (
    SELECT
      1
    FROM invoice_lines AS T2
    WHERE
      T2.track_id = T1.id
  ) AND EXISTS (
    SELECT
      1
    FROM playlist_tracks AS T3
    WHERE
      T3.track_id = T1.id
  )
